name: Cairo
industries: Mega-project construction, banking, telecoms and a growing software offshoring sector anchor Cairo's project economy.
intro: Cairo sits at the centre of the Arab world's largest construction and transformation programme: the New Administrative Capital, monorail lines, and a national digitisation drive that has made Egypt a serious offshoring destination for Gulf and European clients. The city's engineering and consulting firms staff mega-projects at home and export project talent across the Gulf — where Egyptian professionals with international certification command regional salaries. PMP is the recognised standard across construction, energy and government programmes; Scrum credentials grow with Smart Village's software exporters. Batches are scheduled live online across the whole year at hours built for Cairo: a weekend Sat–Sun cohort and a weekday Wed–Thu cohort each week, all landing in comfortable local daytime; every upcoming date and its exact Cairo timing is listed in the schedule below. Afterwards you get careful exam application support, mock exams at real difficulty, and open trainer access until you pass.

faq.q: What are the class timings in Cairo?
faq.a: Live classes run 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM UK, which is 11:00 AM – 08:00 PM GMT+3 in Cairo. You can pick a weekend (Sat–Sun) or a weekday (Wed–Thu) cohort; each completes the course over two consecutive days.

faq.q: Is the training online or at a venue in Cairo?
faq.a: All batches are 100% live online, taught by an instructor over video with interactive exercises — there is no venue to travel to in Cairo. You need a laptop, a stable connection and a free weekend.

faq.q: Is the certificate different if I attend from Egypt?
faq.a: No. The certification is issued by the same global body regardless of where you attend from, and holds identical recognition with employers in Egypt and internationally.

faq.q: Can my employer in Cairo sponsor the course?
faq.a: Yes. We issue invoices suitable for corporate sponsorship and reimbursement, and most employers in Egypt accept them under learning and development budgets. Group pricing is available for teams.

meta.title: {course} Training in Cairo — Live Online Weekend Batches
meta.description: Live online {course} certification training for Cairo: upcoming weekend batch dates in your local time, salary data with sources, and exam cost.
